oneOf.title: mumei dashboard meta
oneOf.description: Backend identity used by the TopBar. Producer: dashboard/server/meta.ts. Consumer: dashboard/src/hooks/useMeta.ts.

projectLabel.description: process.cwd() converted to '~/...' when under $HOME, else the absolute path. Computed by dashboard/server/lib/path.ts.

oneOf.title: mumei dashboard meta stats
oneOf.description: Aggregate counters used by the TopBar. Producer: dashboard/server/meta.ts. Consumer: dashboard/src/hooks/useMeta.ts.

activeCount.description: Count of features with phase != 'done' across .mumei/specs/ and .mumei/plans/.

monthTokens.description: Sum of input_tokens + output_tokens for cost-log entries this calendar month (UTC).

cacheHitRate.description: Project-wide cache_read_input_tokens / (input_tokens + cache_read_input_tokens) for the current month.

hooksPerSec.description: 24-hour rolling average firing rate computed from .hook-stats.jsonl. 0 when the file is absent.

eventCount24h.description: Count of activity events (commits + reviews + hooks + phase changes) in the last 24 hours.
